text:
<think>I should begin with a literal answer to the question, addressing the common saying and its implications.</think>
Yes, you can teach an old dog new tricks.  
<think>I should clarify that while learning is possible, it may come with some challenges due to age-related factors.</think>
However, older dogs may take longer to learn because of decreased energy or cognitive changes.  
<think>It is important to mention that patience and positive reinforcement are key in training any dog, especially older ones.</think>
Using patience, consistency, and positive reinforcement can help older dogs successfully learn new behaviors.  
<think>I should conclude with a statement that encourages persistence and highlights the benefits of ongoing training for dogs of all ages.</think>
Continued training can also provide mental stimulation and strengthen the bond between you and your dog, regardless of age.
